product_overview: Wameed POS is a Saudi-first, multi-tenant cloud POS platform for retail and food-service businesses. It supports offline-capable store operations, ZATCA-compliant invoicing, and a separate internal platform admin layer for operating the SaaS business.
core_goals: Enable fast, reliable point-of-sale operations for Saudi businesses across retail and food-service verticals
Support secure multi-tenant authentication, role-based access, and multi-device session control
Manage stores, onboarding, catalog, inventory, orders, payments, staff, customers, and reports through a unified API
Provide offline sync, backup, and recovery workflows so stores can continue operating during connectivity loss
Support Saudi compliance needs including VAT reporting and ZATCA Phase 2 invoice submission
Give the internal platform team admin capabilities for provider management, billing, support, and platform configuration

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows users to register, log in with password or PIN, verify OTPs, manage profile data, refresh tokens, and revoke sessions across one or all devices.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/auth/register with valid user and organization details -> Receive 201 with new account data -> POST /api/v2/auth/login with email and password -> Receive 200 with JWT/Sanctum token -> GET /api/v2/auth/me with token -> Receive current user profile
POST /api/v2/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized response
POST /api/v2/auth/otp/send with phone or email -> Receive 200 confirmation -> POST /api/v2/auth/otp/verify with valid OTP -> Receive 200 with verified session data
GET /api/v2/auth/me without token -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> POST /api/v2/auth/logout without token -> Receive 401 unauthorized response

POST /api/v2/auth/login/pin with valid email and PIN -> Receive 200 with access token -> PUT /api/v2/auth/profile with token and updated locale/phone -> Receive 200 with updated profile -> POST /api/v2/auth/logout-all with token -> Receive 200 and all tokens revoked

features.name: Core Stores and Onboarding
features.description: Supports store discovery, store settings, working hours, business-type templates, and onboarding wizard progress for new providers.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/core/stores/mine with token -> Receive 200 with stores in the current organization -> GET /api/v2/core/stores/{id}/settings -> Receive 200 with store settings -> PUT /api/v2/core/stores/{id}/working-hours with new schedule -> Receive 200 with updated hours

GET /api/v2/core/business-types with token -> Receive 200 with supported business type templates -> POST /api/v2/core/stores/{id}/business-type with a valid business type -> Receive 200 and template applied

GET /api/v2/core/onboarding/steps with token -> Receive 200 with onboarding steps -> POST /api/v2/core/onboarding/complete-step for a valid step -> Receive 200 with step marked complete -> GET /api/v2/core/onboarding/progress -> Receive 200 with updated progress
POST /api/v2/core/onboarding/complete-step with an invalid or already-completed step -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/core/onboarding/reset with token -> Receive 200 and onboarding state reset -> GET /api/v2/core/onboarding/checklist -> Receive 200 with checklist back to default state

features.name: Catalog
features.description: Manages products, categories, suppliers, variants, modifiers, barcodes, and catalog snapshot/change-feed sync support.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/catalog/categories with a new category name -> Receive 201 with category created -> POST /api/v2/catalog/products with valid product data -> Receive 201 with product created -> GET /api/v2/catalog/products/{id} -> Receive 200 with product details
POST /api/v2/catalog/products with missing or invalid pricing fields -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/v2/catalog/products/{id}/variants -> Receive 200 with current variants -> POST /api/v2/catalog/products/{id}/variants/sync with a valid variants array -> Receive 200 and synced variants

GET /api/v2/catalog/products/{id}/modifiers -> Receive 200 with current modifier groups -> POST /api/v2/catalog/products/{id}/modifiers/sync with invalid modifier references -> Receive 422 validation error

GET /api/v2/catalog/products/catalog with token -> Receive 200 with full catalog snapshot -> GET /api/v2/catalog/products/changes with timestamp -> Receive 200 with incremental catalog changes -> POST /api/v2/catalog/products/{id}/barcode -> Receive 200 with generated barcode

features.name: Inventory
features.description: Supports purchase orders, stock levels, stock movements, reorder thresholds, adjustments, transfers, goods receipts, and recipes/BOMs.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/inventory/purchase-orders with valid supplier and item lines -> Receive 201 with purchase order created -> POST /api/v2/inventory/purchase-orders/{id}/send -> Receive 200 and order marked sent -> POST /api/v2/inventory/purchase-orders/{id}/receive -> Receive 200 with stock received and inventory updated
POST /api/v2/inventory/purchase-orders/{id}/receive before the PO is sent -> Receive error response indicating invalid workflow state

GET /api/v2/inventory/stock-levels with token -> Receive 200 with product/store stock quantities -> PUT /api/v2/inventory/stock-levels/{id}/reorder-point with a threshold -> Receive 200 with updated reorder level
POST /api/v2/inventory/stock-adjustments with waste/count/correction data -> Receive 201 with adjustment recorded -> GET /api/v2/inventory/stock-movements -> Receive 200 with updated movement history

POST /api/v2/inventory/stock-transfers with source, destination, and items -> Receive 201 with transfer created -> POST /api/v2/inventory/stock-transfers/{id}/approve -> Receive 200 approved -> POST /api/v2/inventory/stock-transfers/{id}/receive -> Receive 200 with transfer completed

features.name: POS Terminal
features.description: Handles cashier sessions, sale transactions, held carts, and transaction voiding for day-to-day point-of-sale workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/pos/sessions with terminal_id and opening_cash -> Receive 201 with session opened -> POST /api/v2/pos/transactions with items and payment details -> Receive 201 with completed transaction -> GET /api/v2/pos/sessions/{id} -> Receive 200 with session totals
POST /api/v2/pos/transactions with invalid item or payment payload -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/pos/held-carts with current cart contents -> Receive 201 and cart held -> PUT /api/v2/pos/held-carts/{id}/recall -> Receive 200 and cart restored
POST /api/v2/pos/transactions/{id}/void for an already voided or unauthorized transaction -> Receive error response such as 403 or 409
PUT /api/v2/pos/sessions/{id}/close with counted_cash -> Receive 200 with cash variance and session closed

features.name: Orders and Returns
features.description: Supports order creation, status transitions, voiding, returns, and return lookup for operational and post-sale workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/orders with customer and item data -> Receive 201 with order created -> PUT /api/v2/orders/{id}/status with next lifecycle status -> Receive 200 with updated status -> GET /api/v2/orders/{id} -> Receive 200 with full order and items
POST /api/v2/orders/{id}/void for an order that cannot be voided -> Receive error response indicating invalid state or permission issue
POST /api/v2/orders/{id}/return with return lines and reason -> Receive 201 with return processed -> GET /api/v2/orders/returns/list -> Receive 200 with list of processed returns
GET /api/v2/orders/returns/{id} for a missing return record -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Payments and Cash
features.description: Manages payments, cash sessions, cash events, and expenses for operational finance tracking.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/payments/cash-sessions with opening float -> Receive 201 with cash session opened -> POST /api/v2/payments/payments with order_id, method, and amount -> Receive 201 with payment recorded -> PUT /api/v2/payments/cash-sessions/{id}/close with counted cash -> Receive 200 with closeout totals
POST /api/v2/payments/payments with missing order_id or amount -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/payments/cash-events with a pay-in or pay-out event -> Receive 201 with cash event recorded -> GET /api/v2/payments/cash-sessions/{id} -> Receive 200 with session details
POST /api/v2/payments/expenses with invalid category or amount -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/v2/payments/expenses with token -> Receive 200 with expense list and totals

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Manages permissions, roles, staff users, attendance, shifts, activity history, and manager PIN override authorization.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/staff/roles with role name and permissions -> Receive 201 with role created -> POST /api/v2/staff/roles/{id}/assign with a user -> Receive 200 with role assigned -> GET /api/v2/staff/users/{id} -> Receive 200 with staff user details
POST /api/v2/staff/users with invalid staff profile data -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/staff/attendance/clock to clock in -> Receive 200 with attendance recorded -> GET /api/v2/staff/attendance -> Receive 200 with attendance history
POST /api/v2/staff/pin-override/authorize with invalid manager PIN -> Receive 401 or 422 authentication error
POST /api/v2/staff/shifts with a valid shift definition -> Receive 201 with shift created -> GET /api/v2/staff/activity-log -> Receive 200 with audit history

features.name: Customers and Loyalty
features.description: Supports customer profiles, customer groups, loyalty configuration, loyalty adjustments, and store-credit ledger actions.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/customers with name, phone, and email -> Receive 201 with customer created -> GET /api/v2/customers/{id} -> Receive 200 with customer profile -> POST /api/v2/customers/loyalty/config -> Receive 200 with loyalty rules saved
POST /api/v2/customers with duplicate or invalid customer data -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/customers/loyalty/adjust with customer and point delta -> Receive 200 with adjusted loyalty balance -> GET /api/v2/customers/loyalty/transactions -> Receive 200 with loyalty history
POST /api/v2/customers/store-credit/topup with negative or invalid amount -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/v2/customers/store-credit/log -> Receive 200 with store credit ledger entries

features.name: Subscription and Billing
features.description: Provides self-service plan management, usage visibility, feature and limit checks, and invoice access for subscribed stores.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/subscription/current with token -> Receive 200 with active subscription details -> GET /api/v2/subscription/usage -> Receive 200 with usage metrics -> GET /api/v2/subscription/check-feature -> Receive 200 with feature access result
POST /api/v2/subscription/subscribe with a valid plan -> Receive 200 or 201 with subscription activated -> GET /api/v2/subscription/invoices -> Receive 200 with invoice list
POST /api/v2/subscription/change-plan with a plan not allowed by current state -> Receive error response such as 409 or 422
POST /api/v2/subscription/cancel -> Receive 200 and subscription marked canceled -> POST /api/v2/subscription/resume -> Receive 200 and subscription resumed
GET /api/v2/plans -> Receive 200 with public plan catalog -> GET /api/v2/plans/compare -> Receive 200 with plan comparison data

features.name: Settings and Localization
features.description: Manages locales, translations, translation overrides, publishing, versioning, and export/import workflows.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/settings/locales with token -> Receive 200 with locale list -> POST /api/v2/settings/locales with a new locale -> Receive 201 with locale added -> GET /api/v2/settings/translations -> Receive 200 with translation entries
POST /api/v2/settings/translations/bulk-import with malformed file payload -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/settings/translations with valid key/value and locale -> Receive 201 with translation created -> POST /api/v2/settings/publish-translations -> Receive 200 and translations published
POST /api/v2/settings/translation-overrides with invalid translation key -> Receive 422 validation error -> GET /api/v2/settings/translation-overrides -> Receive 200 with existing overrides
GET /api/v2/settings/translation-versions -> Receive 200 with version history -> GET /api/v2/settings/export-translations -> Receive 200 with exported translation payload

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Supports notification inbox management, read state, preferences, and FCM token registration for push delivery.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/notifications with token -> Receive 200 with notification list -> GET /api/v2/notifications/unread-count -> Receive 200 with unread count -> PUT /api/v2/notifications/{id}/read -> Receive 200 and notification marked read
PUT /api/v2/notifications/read-all with token -> Receive 200 and all notifications marked read
POST /api/v2/notifications/fcm-tokens with a valid device token -> Receive 200 or 201 with token registered -> DELETE /api/v2/notifications/fcm-tokens -> Receive 200 and token unregistered
PUT /api/v2/notifications/preferences with unsupported preferences payload -> Receive 422 validation error
DELETE /api/v2/notifications/{id} for a missing notification -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Security
features.description: Exposes security policy management, audit logs, device tracking, and login-attempt monitoring for provider accounts.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/security/policy with token -> Receive 200 with current security policy -> PUT /api/v2/security/policy with updated settings -> Receive 200 with policy saved
GET /api/v2/security/audit-logs -> Receive 200 with audit trail entries -> POST /api/v2/security/audit-logs with a new event -> Receive 201 with log entry created

GET /api/v2/security/devices -> Receive 200 with registered devices -> PUT /api/v2/security/devices/{id}/deactivate -> Receive 200 and device deactivated -> PUT /api/v2/security/devices/{id}/remote-wipe -> Receive 200 with wipe requested
GET /api/v2/security/login-attempts/failed-count -> Receive 200 with failed login count -> POST /api/v2/security/login-attempts with a failed attempt record -> Receive 201 with attempt recorded
PUT /api/v2/security/devices/{id}/remote-wipe for an unauthorized or non-existent device -> Receive 403 or 404 error

features.name: Promotions and Coupons
features.description: Manages promotions, coupon generation, analytics, coupon validation, and redemption for discount workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/promotions with promotion rules -> Receive 201 with promotion created -> POST /api/v2/promotions/{id}/generate-coupons -> Receive 200 with coupon codes generated -> GET /api/v2/promotions/{id}/analytics -> Receive 200 with performance metrics
POST /api/v2/promotions with invalid date range or discount structure -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/coupons/validate with a valid coupon code -> Receive 200 with coupon acceptance details -> POST /api/v2/coupons/redeem -> Receive 200 with redemption confirmed
POST /api/v2/coupons/redeem with an expired or already-used code -> Receive 409 or 422 error
POST /api/v2/promotions/{id}/toggle -> Receive 200 and promotion activated or deactivated

features.name: Accounting Integration
features.description: Connects to external accounting providers, manages mappings, triggers exports, and supports retrying failed export jobs.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/accounting/connect with provider credentials -> Receive 200 with connection established -> GET /api/v2/accounting/status -> Receive 200 with integration status -> POST /api/v2/accounting/exports -> Receive 202 or 200 with export job started
POST /api/v2/accounting/connect with invalid OAuth credentials -> Receive 401 or 422 error
PUT /api/v2/accounting/mapping with valid field mappings -> Receive 200 with mappings updated -> GET /api/v2/accounting/mapping -> Receive 200 with saved mappings
POST /api/v2/accounting/exports/{id}/retry for a non-failed export -> Receive error response indicating retry is not allowed
GET /api/v2/accounting/exports -> Receive 200 with export history -> GET /api/v2/accounting/exports/{id} -> Receive 200 with export details

features.name: Reports
features.description: Provides operational and financial reporting such as sales summaries, product performance, staff metrics, hourly sales, payment methods, and dashboard views.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/reports/dashboard with token -> Receive 200 with dashboard metrics -> GET /api/v2/reports/sales-summary -> Receive 200 with sales summary data -> GET /api/v2/reports/hourly-sales -> Receive 200 with hourly trend data
GET /api/v2/reports/product-performance with token -> Receive 200 with product performance report
GET /api/v2/reports/category-breakdown -> Receive 200 with category contribution report -> GET /api/v2/reports/payment-methods -> Receive 200 with payment method breakdown
GET /api/v2/reports/staff-performance without proper permissions -> Receive 403 forbidden
GET /api/v2/reports/sales-summary with an invalid date range -> Receive 422 validation error

features.name: Owner Dashboard
features.description: Delivers owner-focused KPIs, sales trends, top products, low stock alerts, active cashier visibility, and financial summaries.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/stats with token -> Receive 200 with KPI overview -> GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/sales-trend -> Receive 200 with trend chart data -> GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/low-stock -> Receive 200 with low-stock items
GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/recent-orders -> Receive 200 with recent order list -> GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/active-cashiers -> Receive 200 with active cashier sessions
GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/financial-summary -> Receive 200 with revenue and expense summary -> GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/hourly-sales -> Receive 200 with hourly chart
GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/branches -> Receive 200 with branch list -> GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/staff-performance -> Receive 200 with staff performance metrics
GET /api/v2/owner-dashboard/low-stock with no authenticated token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Labels and Customization
features.description: Allows management of label templates, print history, receipt styling, quick-access shortcuts, and store UI customization settings.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/labels/templates -> Receive 200 with available label templates -> POST /api/v2/labels/templates with a new template -> Receive 201 with template created -> GET /api/v2/labels/templates/{id} -> Receive 200 with template details
POST /api/v2/labels/templates with missing required design fields -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/v2/labels/print-history -> Receive 200 with print history -> POST /api/v2/labels/print-history with a print record -> Receive 201 with print history entry created
GET /api/v2/customization/settings -> Receive 200 with current customization settings -> PUT /api/v2/customization/settings with updated theme or layout options -> Receive 200 with settings saved
PUT /api/v2/customization/receipt with invalid receipt template payload -> Receive 422 validation error -> GET /api/v2/customization/quick-access -> Receive 200 with shortcut configuration

features.name: Sync and Backup
features.description: Supports offline sync push/pull flows, sync diagnostics, conflict inspection, heartbeats, backup creation, restore, and schedule management.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/sync/push with offline changes -> Receive 200 with push accepted -> GET /api/v2/sync/status -> Receive 200 with current sync state -> GET /api/v2/sync/pull -> Receive 200 with server changes pulled down
GET /api/v2/sync/conflicts -> Receive 200 with conflict list -> POST /api/v2/sync/heartbeat -> Receive 200 and heartbeat recorded
GET /api/v2/sync/full -> Receive 200 with full snapshot of server data
POST /api/v2/backup/create -> Receive 200 or 201 with backup created -> GET /api/v2/backup/list -> Receive 200 with backup history -> GET /api/v2/backup/{id} -> Receive 200 with backup details
POST /api/v2/backup/{id}/restore for an invalid or inaccessible backup -> Receive 404 or 409 error -> PUT /api/v2/backup/schedule with new schedule -> Receive 200 with backup schedule updated

features.name: ZATCA E-Invoicing
features.description: Provides enrollment, renewal, invoice submission, batch submission, invoice XML retrieval, compliance summary, and VAT reporting for Saudi e-invoicing requirements.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/zatca/enroll with valid device and certificate data -> Receive 200 with device enrolled -> POST /api/v2/zatca/submit-invoice with a compliant invoice payload -> Receive 200 with submission result -> GET /api/v2/zatca/compliance-summary -> Receive 200 with compliance status
POST /api/v2/zatca/enroll with missing or invalid certificate data -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v2/zatca/submit-batch with a valid batch of invoices -> Receive 200 with batch acceptance -> GET /api/v2/zatca/invoices -> Receive 200 with submission history
GET /api/v2/zatca/invoices/{id}/xml for a non-existent submission -> Receive 404 not found
GET /api/v2/zatca/vat-report -> Receive 200 with VAT reporting data -> POST /api/v2/zatca/renew -> Receive 200 with renewed CSID

features.name: Industry Restaurant
features.description: Supports restaurant-specific workflows such as table management, kitchen tickets, reservations, and tabs.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/industry/restaurant/tables with table metadata -> Receive 201 with table created -> PATCH /api/v2/industry/restaurant/tables/{id}/status -> Receive 200 with table status updated -> GET /api/v2/industry/restaurant/tables -> Receive 200 with table list

POST /api/v2/industry/restaurant/kitchen-tickets with ticket details -> Receive 201 with kitchen ticket created -> PATCH /api/v2/industry/restaurant/kitchen-tickets/{id}/status -> Receive 200 with ticket status updated
POST /api/v2/industry/restaurant/reservations with booking data -> Receive 201 with reservation created -> GET /api/v2/industry/restaurant/reservations -> Receive 200 with reservation list
POST /api/v2/industry/restaurant/tabs with tab owner and table info -> Receive 201 with tab created -> GET /api/v2/industry/restaurant/tabs -> Receive 200 with tab list
POST /api/v2/industry/restaurant/kitchen-tickets with malformed items payload -> Receive 201 may still succeed due to known validation limitation, but downstream processing may fail

features.name: Industry Verticals
features.description: Covers vertical-specific workflows for pharmacy, bakery, electronics, florist, and jewelry operations.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/industry/pharmacy/prescriptions with prescription details -> Receive 201 with prescription created -> GET /api/v2/industry/pharmacy/prescriptions -> Receive 200 with prescription list
POST /api/v2/industry/bakery/production-batches with batch data -> Receive 201 with production batch created -> GET /api/v2/industry/bakery/production-batches -> Receive 200 with batch list
POST /api/v2/industry/electronics/imei with serial and IMEI data -> Receive 201 with IMEI record created -> GET /api/v2/industry/electronics/imei -> Receive 200 with IMEI records
POST /api/v2/industry/electronics/repair-jobs without staff_user_id -> Receive DB-level failure because staff_user_id is required in storage despite nullable validation
POST /api/v2/industry/electronics/trade-ins with required trade-in fields -> Receive 201 with trade-in created or DB error if staff_user_id is omitted

POST /api/v2/industry/florist/arrangements with arrangement details -> Receive 201 with arrangement created -> GET /api/v2/industry/florist/arrangements -> Receive 200 with arrangement list -> POST /api/v2/industry/jewelry/items with weight and purity data -> Receive 201 with jewelry item created

features.name: Hardware
features.description: Manages printer, scanner, and scale configuration, hardware test connections, supported models, and hardware event logs.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/hardware/config with device settings -> Receive 201 with hardware config saved -> GET /api/v2/hardware/config -> Receive 200 with current config
POST /api/v2/hardware/test with a configured device -> Receive 200 with successful connection test
POST /api/v2/hardware/event-log with a printer or scanner event -> Receive 201 with event recorded -> GET /api/v2/hardware/event-logs -> Receive 200 with event history
POST /api/v2/hardware/config with invalid model or connection parameters -> Receive 422 validation error
DELETE /api/v2/hardware/config/{id} for a missing configuration -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Companion App
features.description: Provides a mobile companion experience for quick stats, summaries, sessions, preferences, and quick actions.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/companion/quick-stats with token -> Receive 200 with sales and inventory snapshot -> GET /api/v2/companion/summary -> Receive 200 with summary data
POST /api/v2/companion/sessions with device/session data -> Receive 201 with companion session started -> GET /api/v2/companion/sessions -> Receive 200 with session list
GET /api/v2/companion/preferences -> Receive 200 with current preferences -> PUT /api/v2/companion/preferences with updated options -> Receive 200 with preferences saved
GET /api/v2/companion/quick-actions -> Receive 200 with available actions
PUT /api/v2/companion/preferences with unsupported payload -> Receive 422 validation error

features.name: Auto-Update and Accessibility
features.description: Checks for app updates, reports update status, retrieves changelog/history, and supports accessibility preferences and shortcuts.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/auto-update/check with current version data -> Receive 200 with update availability -> GET /api/v2/auto-update/changelog -> Receive 200 with release notes -> GET /api/v2/auto-update/current-version -> Receive 200 with deployed version
POST /api/v2/auto-update/report-status with install outcome -> Receive 200 with status recorded
GET /api/v2/auto-update/history -> Receive 200 with update history

GET /api/v2/accessibility/preferences -> Receive 200 with public accessibility preferences -> PUT /api/v2/accessibility/preferences with new contrast or font settings -> Receive 200 with preferences updated
PUT /api/v2/accessibility/shortcuts with invalid shortcut mapping -> Receive 422 validation error

features.name: Nice-to-Have Features
features.description: Includes wishlist, appointments, CFD configuration, gift registry, digital signage, and gamification endpoints for optional product extensions.
user_flows: POST /api/v2/nice-to-have/wishlist with wishlist item data -> Receive 201 with wishlist item added -> GET /api/v2/nice-to-have/wishlist -> Receive 200 with wishlist list
POST /api/v2/nice-to-have/appointments with valid appointment data -> Receive 201 with appointment created -> GET /api/v2/nice-to-have/appointments -> Receive 200 with appointment list
GET /api/v2/nice-to-have/cfd-config -> Receive 200 with CFD settings
POST /api/v2/nice-to-have/gift-registry with registry details -> Receive 201 with registry created -> GET /api/v2/nice-to-have/gift-registry -> Receive 200 with registry list
GET /api/v2/nice-to-have/gamification -> Receive 200 with gamification data -> GET /api/v2/nice-to-have/digital-signage -> Receive 200 with signage list

features.name: Platform Admin
features.description: Provides internal admin endpoints for analytics, providers, users, feature flags, and support tickets using a separate admin-api guard rather than provider Sanctum tokens.
user_flows: GET /api/v2/admin/analytics/overview with a provider Sanctum token -> Receive 401 unauthorized as expected for provider-side users
GET /api/v2/admin/providers with a provider Sanctum token -> Receive 401 unauthorized as expected
GET /api/v2/admin/users with a provider Sanctum token -> Receive 401 unauthorized as expected
GET /api/v2/admin/feature-flags with a provider Sanctum token -> Receive 401 unauthorized as expected
GET /api/v2/admin/support/tickets with a provider Sanctum token -> Receive 401 unauthorized as expected

tech_stack: Spatie Permission / Activity Log / Media Library / Backup

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login (email+password and PIN), registration, OTP, profile, token refresh, logout, multi-device session control via Sanctum.

endpoints.description: Login with email+password. Body {email,password}. Returns 200 + data.token on success, 401 on bad creds, 422 on validation error.
Register new account. Body {email,password,phone,organization_name,country}. 201 success, 422 duplicate.
Current user. 200 with user object, 401 without token.

features.name: Core - Stores and Onboarding
features.description: Store CRUD, settings, working hours, business types, onboarding wizard.

features.name: Catalog
features.description: Products (variants, modifiers), categories tree, suppliers, barcode generation, change feed.

features.name: Inventory
features.description: Purchase orders, stock levels and movements, adjustments, transfers, goods receipts, recipes (BOM).

features.name: POS Terminal
features.description: Cashier sessions, POS transactions, void, held carts.

features.name: Orders and Returns
features.description: Order CRUD, status transitions, voids and returns.

features.name: Payments and Cash
features.description: Payments, cash sessions and events, expenses.

features.name: Staff Management
features.description: Permissions, roles, staff users, attendance, shifts, activity log, PIN override.

features.name: Customers and Loyalty
features.description: Customer CRUD, customer groups, loyalty config and transactions, store credit.

features.name: Subscription and Billing
features.description: Plans, subscription management, invoices, feature/limit checks.

features.name: Settings and Localization
features.description: Locales, translations, overrides, publishing.

features.name: Notifications
features.description: In-app notifications, preferences, FCM tokens.

features.name: Security
features.description: Security policies, audit logs, devices, login attempts.

features.name: Promotions and Coupons
features.description: Promotion management, coupon generation, validation, redemption, analytics.

features.name: Accounting Integration
features.description: External accounting (Xero/QuickBooks), mappings, exports.

features.name: Reports
features.description: Sales summary, product/category/staff performance, hourly sales.

features.name: Owner Dashboard
features.description: Owner KPIs, sales trend, top products, low stock.

features.name: Labels and Customization
features.description: Label templates, print history, receipt customization, quick access.

features.name: Sync and Backup
features.description: Offline sync push/pull/conflict resolution, backups, restore.

features.name: ZATCA E-Invoicing
features.description: Saudi ZATCA Phase 2 enrollment, invoice submission, VAT report.

features.name: Industry Restaurant
features.description: Tables, kitchen tickets, reservations, tabs.

features.name: Industry Verticals (Pharmacy, Bakery, Electronics, Florist, Jewelry)
features.description: Pharmacy prescriptions; Bakery production batches; Electronics IMEI/repair/trade-ins; Florist arrangements; Jewelry items (weight, purity).

features.name: Hardware
features.description: Hardware (printer/scanner/scale) configuration and event log.

features.name: Companion App
features.description: Mobile companion quick stats, sessions, preferences, quick actions.

features.name: Auto-Update and Accessibility
features.description: App version checks; accessibility preferences and shortcuts.

features.name: Nice-to-Have Features
features.description: Wishlist, appointments, CFD config, gift registry, digital signage, gamification.

features.name: Platform Admin
features.description: Platform-side admin endpoints (analytics, billing, content, deployment, feature flags, infrastructure, marketplace, packages, platform roles, provider mgmt, security center, support, user mgmt). Uses admin-api guard, NOT Sanctum. Provider-side test users will receive 401 here — this is expected and a successful test asserts 401.

endpoints.description: Analytics. Expects 401 with provider Sanctum token.
Providers list. Expects 401 with provider token.

known_limitations.issue: Platform admin endpoints use admin-api guard. Provider-side test users will receive 401 (expected behavior; tests should assert 401).
known_limitations.impact: Admin tests must use a separate admin token; with provider creds they should expect 401.

known_limitations.issue: Restaurant kitchen-ticket creation lacks items_json array validation.
known_limitations.impact: Malformed item payloads may be persisted.

known_limitations.issue: Electronics repair jobs and trade-ins declare staff_user_id nullable in validation but column is NOT NULL in DB.
known_limitations.impact: Inserts can fail at DB level when staff_user_id omitted.
